description: You are a rail yard security manager. Identify the Toxic Inhalation Hazard (TIH) Zone (A, B, C, D, or NONE) for the five chemicals listed in the rail manifest at '~/Desktop/rail_manifest.txt' using CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). Create a report at '~/Documents/tih_security_audit.txt' listing each chemical and its Zone (or NONE) using the format 'Chemical: ZONE X'.
